name: Xiamen Hexing Packaging Printing Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiamen Hexing Packaging Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells packaging materials in China. It offers corrugated cartons that are primarily used as packaging products for protecting products, facilitating transportation, and handling and improving publicity; pre-printed corrugated paperboards; color printing used in middle-to-high-end commodity packaging; pearl foams; honeycomb paperboards; and molded pulp. The company also provides designing and manufacturing services for various kinds of books, periodicals, instructions, and other products. It serves customers in household appliance, electronics, food products, beverages, cosmetics, daily-use chemical products, pharmaceuticals, automobile parts, kitchen and sanitary wares, and other areas. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Xiamen, China.
